about.title: About LUDICADEMI
about.subtitle: Discover the story and passion behind our immersive experiences
about.metaDescription: Discover LUDICADEMI, expert in cultural immersion in Martinique. Passionate founder, mission and values.

founder.name: PHAYNE ANTON
founder.bio: Passionate about Caribbean culture for over 10 years, I guide you through authentic experiences that allow you to discover Martinique from a unique angle.
founder.expertise: Author under the name PHAYNE ANTON, I combine my passion for local culture with excursions and immersive stays that transport you to the heart of Martinique identity. My local and cultural expertise guarantees you a total and authentic immersion.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Offer authentic and immersive experiences that allow you to discover Martinique differently, creating lasting bonds with the culture and local inhabitants.
